name: property managers handling 10-50 rental units tool
description: For property managers handling 10-50 rental units, manual tracking of rent payments causes late notifications of delinquencies. We automate monthly rent roll reports instead of manual spreadsheets and email reminders.
problem_solved: manual tracking of rent payments and reporting

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual tracking of rent payments and reporting
